codeReview.summary: The decomposition commit materially split HR/payroll into focused services and reduced facade/controller coupling, but it does not fully satisfy the stated decomposition threshold for all target services after subsequent milestone commits. PayrollCalculationService now exceeds the 500-line decomposition target (605 LOC), so the milestone decomposition contract is not fully met.

issues.description: VAL-HR-001 requires decomposed focused services under 500 lines; PayrollCalculationService is currently 605 lines in HEAD, so the decomposition acceptance criterion is unmet.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Task-based scrutiny reviewer spawning can fail when mission model aliases are not accepted by the Task runtime, and the scrutiny-validator skill lacks a documented fallback to manual in-session review artifact creation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: All Task launches during this run failed with Invalid model: custom:5.3 codex xhigh pro despite available custom aliases, requiring manual review report authoring.

summary: Fail due to decomposition threshold regression: PayrollCalculationService exceeds the under-500-lines contract even though service split and behavioral coverage are otherwise substantial.
